nameMeanings.name: Ackhurst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Akehurst
meanings: English (Sussex): habitational name from Akehurst Farm in Hellingly, Sussex, named from Old English āc ‘oak’ + hyrst ‘wooded hill’. The modern spelling of the placename is Oakhurst.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: Edward Ackhurst was born in 1425. He married Elizabeth Wildish in January 1887. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1500, in Sherborne, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Edward Ackhurst est né en 1425. Il a épousé Elizabeth Wildish en janvier 1887. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1500, à Sherborne, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Edward Ackhurst wurde 1425 geboren. Er hat im Januar 1887 Elizabeth Wildish geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1500 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Sherborne, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Edward Ackhurst è nato il nel 1425. Lui sposato Elizabeth Wildish nel gennaio 1887. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1500, nel Sherborne, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Ackhurstは1425年に生まれた。1887年1月にElizabeth Wildishと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1500年にイギリスイギリスドールセトシェルボルンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Ackhurst(은)는 1425년 태어났다. 그는 1887년 1월 Elizabeth Wildish(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 셔본에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Edward Ackhurst nasceu em 1425. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wildish em janeiro de 1887. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1500, em Sherborne, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Edward Ackhurst родился в 1425 г. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wildish январь 1887 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1500 г. в местности ширборн, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Edward Ackhurst nació en 1425. Se casó con Elizabeth Wildish en enero de 1887. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1500, en Sherborne, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
